name: 3D Modeling
description: I enjoy creating 3D models using software like Blender. I have created various models, including characters, environments, and props.

name: Coding
description: The language I usually use to create programs is Python. With Python, I can create several projects with libraries and frameworks, such as Flask, Pillow, OpenCv, and others. but that doesn't mean I don't want to learn other languages, now I'm still learning Javascript and languages for building websites

name: Digital Art
description: I like drawing. In the past, I often drew with pencils and pens, but with the advancement of technology, I also often try digital drawing with existing applications such as IbisPaintX and FlipaClip for animation sometimes, cuz it free...

name: Video Editing
description: I sometimes like to edit videos when I have an idea, I usually use CapCut, with CapCut I can edit several short videos for content material, maybe even a music video.
